en: nice single men There must be someone Sally found someone
ko: 멋진 독신 남자들. 누군가는 있을 거야. 샐리가 누군가를 찾았어.

en: Well Sally got the last good one
ko: 글쎄, 샐리가 마지막 좋은 남자를 잡았네. 조와 나는 헤어졌어.

en: Joe and I broke up What When Monday You waited three days to tell us Is Joe available For
ko: 뭐? 언제? 월요일. 우리한테 말하는 데 3일이나 기다렸어?

en: God's sakes Marie don't you have any feelings about this She's obviously upset I'm not that upset We've been growing apart for
ko: 세상에 마리, 이것에 대해 감정이 없어? 분명히 속상하잖아. 그렇게 속상하진 않아. 우리 사이가 멀어진 거

en: quite a while But you guys were a couple You had someone to go places with You had a date on national holidays I
ko: 하지만 너희는 커플이었잖아. 함께 갈 사람이 있었고. 공휴일에 데이트도 했잖아.

en: said to myself you deserve more than this You're 31 years old And the clock is ticking No the clock doesn't really start to
ko: 너는 31살이야. 그리고 시간은 흘러가고 있어. 아니, 36세가 되어야 진짜로 시작돼.

en: God you're in such great shape Well I've had a few days to get used to it and I feel okay
ko: 글쎄, 며칠 동안 적응할 시간이 있었고, 괜찮아.

en: Really Marie Well how else do you think you'd do it I've got the perfect guy I don't happen to find him attractive
ko: 정말로, 마리? 그럼 어떻게 할 거라고 생각해?

en: but you might She doesn't have a problem with chins
ko: 하지만 넌 그럴 수도 있어. 그녀는 턱 문제는 없어

en: Marie I'm not ready yet But you just said you were over him I am over him but I'm in a mourning
ko: 너 방금 그를 잊었다고 했잖아. 나는 그를 잊었지만, 지금은 애도 기간이야.
